HELLKITE-DRAGON_HEART_GEM_CARD.descripti:
Gain [gold]Absorb[/gold]. 
 When you take damage 
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
HELLKITE-DRAGON_HEART_GEM_CARD.title: Dragon Heart Gem
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_CRAGS_CARD.description:
Gain [gold]Molten Crags[/gold]. 
When you take damage 
return that damage as [gold]Scorch[/gold].
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_CRAGS_CARD.title: Molten Crags
HELLKITE-BOIL_OVER_CARD.title: Boil Over
HELLKITE-LIVING_FURNACE_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn 
gain 2 [gold]Charges[/gold] 
gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Kindle[/gold].
HELLKITE-LIVING_FURNACE_CARD.title: Living Furnace
HELLKITE-ETERNAL_FLAME_CARD.description:
Lose 3 [gold]Charge[/gold].
This turn, whenever you play a card, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to a random enemy.
HELLKITE-ETERNAL_FLAME_CARD.title: Eternal Flame
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_BLOOD_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, 
gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Charge{Power:plural:|s}[/gold].
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_BLOOD_CARD.title: Dragons Blood
HELLKITE-CAUTERIZE_CARD.description:
Whenever you deal unblocked Attack damage, 
apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold].
HELLKITE-CAUTERIZE_CARD.title: Cauterize
HELLKITE-FLASH_FIRE_CARD.description:
Whenever you draw a card, 
apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HELLKITE-FLASH_FIRE_CARD.title: Flash Fire
HELLKITE-REKINDLE_CARD.title: Rekindle
HELLKITE-BURNING_SOUL_CARD.description: Your first [gold]Scorch[/gold] card applies 2X [gold]Scorch[/gold] each turn.
HELLKITE-BURNING_SOUL_CARD.title: Burning Soul
HELLKITE-FUEL_ON_YOUR_PYRE_CARD.descript:
Lose 2 [gold]Charge[/gold].
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold]. 
Then apply half of the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL other enemies.
HELLKITE-FUEL_ON_YOUR_PYRE_CARD.title: Fuel On Your Pyre
HELLKITE-HOW_MANY_TIMES_CARD.description: This turn, whenever you play a card, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to that enemy.
HELLKITE-HOW_MANY_TIMES_CARD.title: How Many Times
HELLKITE-CONSERVE_CARD.description:
Next turn, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
Next turn, gain {FireUpNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Charge{FireUpNextTurnPower:plural:|s}[/gold].
HELLKITE-CONSERVE_CARD.title: Conserve
HELLKITE-BURNING_REPRISAL_CARD.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {RazorScalesPower:diff()} Razor Scales.
This turn, when you take damage, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to the attacker.
HELLKITE-BURNING_REPRISAL_CARD.title: Burning Reprisal
HELLKITE-TEMPER_WITH_FIRE_CARD.title: Temper With Fire
HELLKITE-SCALE_MAIL_CARD.title: Scale Mail
HELLKITE-MOVING_ON_CARD.description:
While you have 5 or less [gold]Charge[/gold], 
draw {Power:diff()} additional card{Power:plural:|s} each turn.
HELLKITE-MOVING_ON_CARD.title: Moving On
HELLKITE-LIGHTEN_LOAD_CARD.description:
Lose {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold], 
at the start of your turn, 
if you have 21 or more [gold]Charge[/gold], 
gain {Power:diff()} energy.
HELLKITE-LIGHTEN_LOAD_CARD.title: Lighten the Load
HELLKITE-HEAT_STROKE_CARD.description:
Every 3 times you apply [gold]Scorch[/gold],

HELLKITE-FUEL_THE_FLAMES_CARD.title: Fuel The Flames
HELLKITE-CHARGED_SCALES_CARD.description:
Whenever you gain or spend [gold]Charge[/gold],

HELLKITE-BURNING_AURA_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, 
apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies.

HELLKITE-TEMPER_CARD.description:
Whenever you play a card, gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].

HELLKITE-DRAGON_PUNCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold]. Then double the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold].

HELLKITE-FLAMEBLADE.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Charge[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

HELLKITE-TRADE_BLOWS.title: Trade Blows
HELLKITE-TAIL_LASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

HELLKITE-SHEDSHELL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If you have [gold]Plating[/gold], apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold].

HELLKITE-MORE_CHARGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Gain {FireUp:diff()} [gold]{FireUp:plural:Charge|Charges}[/gold].

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If this kills, gain {FireUp:diff()} [gold]{FireUp:plural:Charge|Charges}[/gold].

HELLKITE-BACKDRAFT_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.

Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to all enemies.

HELLKITE-SURPRISE_POUNCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If this is the first Attack this turn: gain {FireUp:diff()} [gold]{FireUp:plural:Charge|Charges}[/gold] 
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
HELLKITE-SURPRISE_POUNCE.title: Surprise Pounce
HELLKITE-BURN_WOUND.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Charge[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Trigger the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold] once.

HELLKITE-SEARING_RUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. 
Lose 2 [gold]Charges[/gold]. 
If you have 21 or more [gold]Charge[/gold], gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].

Spend X [gold]Charge[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] X times to random enemies.

HELLKITE-RAZOR_WING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Gain 1 [gold]Razor Scale[/gold] for every 4 [gold]Scorch[/gold] on the target.

HELLKITE-SHELL_GAME.title: Shell Game
HELLKITE-ASH_DIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If the target has 10 or more [gold]Scorch[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
HELLKITE-ASH_DIVE.title: Ash Dive
HELLKITE-WATCH_THEM_RUN.description:
Spend 2 [gold]Charges[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Trigger the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold] once.
HELLKITE-WATCH_THEM_RUN.title: Watch Them Run
HELLKITE-SUNNY_DAY.title: Sunny Day
HELLKITE-THIRD_DEGREE.description: If the target has [gold]Scorch[/gold], apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

HELLKITE-CATCH_FIRE.description: Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.

HELLKITE-REFUEL.title: Refuel
HELLKITE-BURN_BRIGHT.title: Burn Bright
HELLKITE-MOLTING_GUARD.title: Molting Guard
HELLKITE-TEMPER_THE_HIDE.title: Temper the Hide
HELLKITE-COOLED_CORE.description:
Spend up to {FireUp:diff()} [gold]{FireUp:plural:Charge|Charges}[/gold]. 
Gain that much [gold]Plating[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
HELLKITE-COOLED_CORE.title: Cooled Core
HELLKITE-FURNACE_RHYTHM.title: Furnace Rhythm
HELLKITE-EMBER_DRAFT.title: Ember Draft
HELLKITE-SCALE_SHATTER.description:
Lose all [gold]Razor Scales[/gold]. 
Deal damage equal to the amount lost to all enemies.
HELLKITE-SCALE_SHATTER.title: Scale Shatter
HELLKITE-CAST_OFF.title: Cast Off
HELLKITE-COVERING_FIRE.description:
Whenever another player attacks an enemy, 
apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to it.
HELLKITE-COVERING_FIRE.title: Covering Fire
HELLKITE-SHARED_PYRE.title: Shared Pyre
HELLKITE-BEAR_DOWN.title: Bear Down
HELLKITE-SHOW_OFF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times. 
Apply 1 [gold]Scorch[/gold] each hit. 
If X is 4 or more, double the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold].
HELLKITE-SHOW_OFF.title: Show Off
HELLKITE-WILDFIRE_WAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. 
If an enemy dies this way, spread its [gold]Scorch[/gold] to all enemies.
HELLKITE-WILDFIRE_WAKE.title: Wildfire Wake
HELLKITE-ONLY_ASHES.description:
Deal damage equal to the target's [gold]Scorch[/gold]. 
Trigger that [gold]Scorch[/gold] once.
HELLKITE-ONLY_ASHES.title: Only Ashes
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_FIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. 
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to all enemies. 
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each enemy that already had [gold]Scorch[/gold].
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_FIRE.title: Dragons Fire
HELLKITE-HONED_TALONS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}. 
If you spent [gold]Charge[/gold] this turn, increase it by {Increase:diff()} again.
HELLKITE-HONED_TALONS.title: Honed Talons
HELLKITE-AGAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Play the next Attack in your hand {Repeat:diff()} times.
HELLKITE-AGAIN.title: Again!
HELLKITE-FIRE_FORCE.description:
Spend 3 [gold]Charges[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. 
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold] to all enemies. Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
HELLKITE-FIRE_FORCE.title: Fire Force
HELLKITE-WORLD_BREAKER.description:
Spend all [gold]Charge[/gold]. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply [gold]Scorch[/gold] equal to the [gold]Charge[/gold] spent to all enemies.
HELLKITE-WORLD_BREAKER.title: World Breaker
HELLKITE-FLAME_CHARGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If you are [gold]Overcharged[/gold], deal it twice.
HELLKITE-FLAME_CHARGE.title: Flame Charge
HELLKITE-NIGHTS_REST.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. 
If you have 15 [gold]Charge[/gold], heal {BonusHeal:diff()} more HP and lose 15 [gold]Charge[/gold].
HELLKITE-NIGHTS_REST.title: Night's Rest
HELLKITE-QUENCH_THE_HEART.title: Quench the Heart
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_AEGIS.title: Molten Aegis
HELLKITE-CATACLYSM.title: Cataclysm
